column1: # ABraOM (SABE, admixed Brazilian) allele frequencies. Columns: key af ac an
# ⚠️ DEMO STUB — the full ABraOM dataset is NOT installed. These 2 rows exist only to
# demonstrate the mechanism (they drive the OBSCN/TTN drops in the examples). For real use,
# obtain the full ABraOM SABE dataset from IB-USP (http://abraom.ib.usp.br) and replace this
# file, or annotate the VCF with ABraOM_AF. A key not in this table is treated as UNKNOWN
# OBSCN: absent in gnomAD but common in Brazilians -> a gnomAD-only pipeline would
# wrongly keep it as a rare candidate; ABraOM correctly flags it as common.
